subtitle: The powerful evolution of RetroFE — now with VLC, smart addons & next-level customization
bento-whatis-p1: RetroFeVLC is a modern, actively developed fork of the popular open-source RetroFE frontend, rebuilt with VLC media library support and optimized for Windows. It delivers a beautiful, lightning-fast interface for managing your collection across 100+ systems.
bento-whatis-p2: By replacing GStreamer with VLC, we've achieved superior video handling, native 4K support, and eliminated memory leaks for arcade cabinet stability.
bento-start-p1: The brain of the system. A built-in GUI for easy configuration — No more editing text files for basic settings. Access Menus, Controls, and Layouts directly.
bento-speed-p: Blazing-fast navigation even with 50,000+ games. Optimized for zero lag and rock-solid stability.
bento-rank-p: RetroFeVLC earns its place among the top 5 best retro gaming frontends in 2026, standing proudly alongside heavyweights like RetroBat, LaunchBox, and PlayNite.
upd-5: New Grid menu option & include files
qs-li4: Right-click the tray icon for Settings & Controls.
legal-p1: RetroFeVLC is an open-source (GPL v3) frontend software based in Portugal. It does not include or distribute copyrighted ROMs or BIOS files. In compliance with Copyright laws and EU legislation (GDPR), users must own the original physical media for any content used.
legal-p2: This site is hosted on GitHub Pages; data collection is limited to technical server logs. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. Any legal disputes shall be settled under Portuguese law and the jurisdiction of the competent courts.
footer-text: RetroFeVLC © 2026 • An open-source evolution of the RetroFE frontend
